channel.title: API_2023_API4 on ZAP
channel.description: Recent content in API_2023_API4 on ZAP

item.title: GraphQL Circular Type Reference
item.description: A circular reference was detected in the GraphQL schema, where object types reference each other in a cycle. This can be exploited by attackers to craft deeply recursive queries, potentially leading to Denial of Service (DoS) conditions.

item.title: LDAP Injection
item.description: LDAP Injection may be possible. It may be possible for an attacker to bypass authentication controls, and to view and modify arbitrary data in the LDAP directory.

item.title: Suspicious Input Transformation - Arithmetic Evaluation
item.description: The application performed a suspicious input transformation that may indicate a security vulnerability. The input was transformed in an unexpected way, suggesting potential issues with input validation, encoding/decoding, or expression evaluation. This could indicate vulnerabilities such as server-side template injection, expression language injection, unicode normalization issues, or other input processing flaws that may be exploitable.

item.title: Suspicious Input Transformation - EL Evaluation
item.description: The application performed a suspicious input transformation that may indicate a security vulnerability. The input was transformed in an unexpected way, suggesting potential issues with input validation, encoding/decoding, or expression evaluation.
